[毓]
Pictogram ( 象形 ): 母 ( “ woman ” ) + 子 ( “ child ” ) — a woman giving birth to a child. Original form of 育 ( OC *luɡ , “to give birth; to raise”). Later decorated and stylized as 每 + 㐬 .

[育]
Evolved geometrically from 胄 ( *l'ɯwɢs ) in Han dynasty era ( Liu, 2023 ).
Before that, Pronunciation 1 was written as 毓 ; see there for more.
